name: netforge
description: Browser automation engine for Hesi — turn any agent into a browser-capable orchestrator

interface.longDescription: NetForge adds browser automation capabilities to Hesi. It provides MCP browser tools, web interaction skills, multi-model inference, and agent-aware system prompt injection — so your orchestrator agents know when to use a browser instead of curl.
defaultPrompt: Use the browser to fetch JavaScript-rendered pages instead of curl.
Route web-interactive tasks to netforge-browser agent.
Compare AI model responses via netforge-multimodel skill.
